rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b). Section 11.252 governs exemptions for leased motor vehicles. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 11.252. MOTOR VEHICLES LEASED FOR USE OTHER THAN PRODUCTION OF INCOME.
_note: No conflict; §11.252 addresses leased motor vehicles, unrelated to homestead exemptions under §11.13(b).
